RuleSet.Name: src/Schema/jpa/SchemaJpaTableRepository.java

GenFile.Name: fileSchemaJpaTableRepositoryJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$jpa/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$.jpa

RuleSet.GenRule: $reference ManufacturingSchema IsSchemaDefSecuritySchema$
$iterate SchemaRefs( empty yes first no each empty )$
$switch IsManufacturingSchemaSecuritySchema yes declSecUserSecurityQueries default empty$
$switch HasDbName yes DbName default Name$
$switch HasDbName yes DbName default Name$
$reference Column switch HasDbName yes DbName default Name$
$reference FromCol switch HasDbName yes DbName default Name$
$reference ToCol switch HasDbName yes DbName default Name$
* @param $leadlower reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable declTableLockers$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes maybeDeclJpaRepositoryLockerIfBaseTable default declJpaRepositoryLock$
$switch TableHasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declJpaRepositoryLockPKey$
$switch IsUnique yes declJpaRepositoryLockSingle default declJpaRepositoryLockMultiple$
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable declTableDeleters$
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes maybeDeclJpaRepositoryDeleterIfBaseTable default declJpaRepositoryDelete$
$switch TableHasSuperClassRelation yes empty default declJpaRepositoryDeleteByPKey$
, $declJpaRepositoryPassKeyAttr$
key.get$reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$()
$reference SuperClassRelation reference ToTable declTableReaders$
$reference Column implJavaAtomType$ $leadlower reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$
, $declJpaRepositoryGetArgument$
key.set$reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$( $leadlower reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$ );
$switch IsPrimaryIndex yes empty default declJpaRepositoryReader$
$switch IsUnique yes declJpaRepositoryReadSingle default declJpaRepositoryReadList$
$switch HasSuperiorRelationCol yes SchemaJpaRepositoryChaseRelationToCol default maybeDerefPKeyJpaRepositoryQueryColumnArg$
$switch ColumnInPrimaryIndex yes maybeDerefJpaRepositoryQueryColumnArg default simpleJpaRepositoryQueryColumnArg$
$switch IsPrimaryIndexKeyAtomic yes simpleJpaRepositoryQueryColumnArg default derefJpaRepositoryQueryColumnArg$
r.$leadlower reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$ = :$leadlower reference Column Name$
r.pkey.$leadlower reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$ = :$leadlower reference Column Name$

r.$reference Column switch InCompositePrimaryKey yes emitMemberJoinAColumnPKeyDot default empty$$reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol reference Relation lower OptionalOrRequired$$reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol reference Relation RelationType$$reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol reference Relation Suffix$.$reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol SchemaJpaRepositoryChaseRelationToCol$

$switch IsToIndexNonAtomicPrimaryKeyIndex yes emitMemberJoinAColumnPKeyDot default empty$$switch ToColHasSuperiorRelationCol yes SchemaJpaRepositoryChaseRelationToColRecurse default SchemaJpaRepositoryFoundRelationToCol$

$reference ToCol reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol reference ToCol reference Column switch InCompositePrimaryKey yes emitMemberJoinAColumnPKeyDot default empty$$reference ToCol reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol reference Relation lower OptionalOrRequired$$reference ToCol reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol reference Relation RelationType$$reference ToCol reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol reference Relation Suffix$.$reference ToCol reference Column reference SuperiorRelationCol SchemaJpaRepositoryChaseRelationToCol$
$reference ToCol reference Column lower implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference ToCol reference Column Name$ = :$popto IndexCol leadlower reference Column Name$
and $declJpaRepositoryQueryColumnArg$
, $declJpaRepositoryArgument$
@Param("$reference Column leadlower Name$") $reference Column implJavaAtomType$ $leadlower reference Column implColumnAttrOptionality$$reference Column Name$
